create_workspace.title: New Workspace
create_workspace.description: Create a new workspace to organize your tabs

delete_workspace.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete_workspace.description: This will permanently delete this workspace and all its collections. This action cannot be undone.

create_collection.title: New Collection
create_collection.description: Create a new tab collection in this workspace.

delete_collection.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete_collection.description: This collection and all its saved tabs will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

save_tabs.title: Save as Collection
save_tabs.description: Save selected tabs as a new collection in the current workspace.

welcome.title: Welcome to OpenTab
welcome.description: Organize your browser tabs into workspaces and collections. Drag tabs from the right panel to get started.

empty.title: Get started
empty.description: Drag tabs from the right panel or save your open tabs as a collection.

about.title: About OpenTab
about.description: OpenTab is a tab management tool
about.feature_sidebar: The left sidebar shows all workspaces. Click + to create a new space
about.feature_drag: The right side of the workspace shows currently open tabs in the browser. You can drag them to the space area to add to favorites
about.docs_prefix: For more information, please refer to

export.title: Export
export.description: Export all your workspaces, collections, and tabs as a JSON file.

import.title: Import
import.description: Import data from a TabTab or OpenTab JSON backup file. You'll be able to preview and select what to import before any changes are made.
import.unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Please select a TabTab or OpenTab JSON file.
import.read_error: Failed to read file. Please ensure it is a valid JSON file.

import_page.no_session: No import session found. Please start import from Settings.
import_page.expired: Import session expired. Please start import from Settings.
import_page.complete: Import complete. This tab will close shortly.
import_page.title: Import Preview
import_page.select_collection: Select a collection to view details
import_page.toast_error: Import failed. No changes were made.

import_detail.identical: This collection is identical — nothing to import.
import_detail.extra_tabs: Extra existing tabs (in your data but not in import)
import_detail.create_message: A new collection "{{name}}" will be created with all imported tabs.

import_summary.summary: Will import: {{workspaces}} new workspaces, {{collections}} collections, {{tabs}} tabs

dnd.not_over_target: {{title}} is no longer over a drop target
